auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Affinda API key sent as a Bearer token. Create and rotate keys from your Affinda user settings: https://docs.affinda.com/reference/authentication.

extraFields.label: API Base URL
extraFields.description: Official Affinda API base URL for your account region. Use https://api.affinda.com, https://api.us1.affinda.com, or https://api.eu1.affinda.com.

actions.name: create_document_from_url
actions.description: Upload a document to Affinda from a URL and optionally wait for parsing results.

url.description: The publicly reachable document URL for Affinda to download and parse.

workspace.description: The Affinda workspace identifier to upload the document to.

documentType.description: The Affinda document type identifier when the document type is already known.

wait.description: Whether Affinda should wait for parsing to complete before responding.

customIdentifier.description: An optional user-defined identifier for tracking the document in Affinda.

fileName.description: The filename Affinda should associate with this document.

expiryTime.description: The ISO 8601 time when Affinda should automatically delete the document.

language.description: The document language code to send to Affinda.

rejectDuplicates.description: Whether Affinda should reject duplicate documents without consuming credits.

lowPriority.description: Whether Affinda should process this document as low priority.

compact.description: Whether Affinda should return a compact parse result when wait is true.

deleteAfterParse.description: Whether Affinda should delete stored data after parsing. Only use with wait true.

enableValidationTool.description: Whether the document should be viewable in the Affinda Validation Tool.

useOcr.description: Whether Affinda should force OCR for this document.

llmHint.description: Optional hint inserted into Affinda's LLM prompt.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a document to Affinda from a URL.

document.description: The Affinda document payload, including meta data and extracted data when returned.

actions.name: get_document
actions.description: Get one Affinda document by identifier.

compact.description: Whether Affinda should return compact parsed data.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Affinda document.

document.description: The Affinda document payload, including meta data and extracted data when returned.

actions.name: list_document_types
actions.description: List Affinda document types available to the API key.

organization.description: Filter document types by Affinda organization identifier.

workspace.description: Filter document types by Affinda workspace identifier.

inputSchema.description: Filters for listing Affinda document types.

outputSchema.description: The Affinda document type list response.

actions.name: list_documents
actions.description: List Affinda documents with optional workflow and pagination filters.

offset.description: The number of documents to skip before collecting results.

limit.description: The number of documents to return.

state.description: Filter by the Affinda document state.

search.description: Match document file names or tag names case-insensitively.

includeData.description: Whether Affinda should include parsed data summaries in the list.

validatable.description: Filter to documents that can be validated.

customIdentifier.description: Filter documents by the custom identifier set at upload.

compact.description: Whether Affinda should return compact parsed data.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination controls for listing Affinda documents.

items.description: The Affinda document payload, including meta data and extracted data when returned.

count.description: The number of documents in the Affinda result set.

anyOf.description: A URL for another page of Affinda results, or null when absent.
A URL for another page of Affinda results, or null when absent.

actions.name: list_organizations
actions.description: List Affinda organizations available to the connected API key.

inputSchema.description: The empty input payload for this Affinda action.

actions.name: list_workspaces
actions.description: List Affinda workspaces in an organization.

organization.description: The Affinda organization identifier to list workspaces for.

name.description: Only return workspaces whose name matches this value.
